UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS WEI YU AND MU TAN'S MOTION TO APPOINT RECEIVER IS GRANTED. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER RE: (1) RECEIVER; AND (2) AMOUNT OF BOND. IF PARTIES ARE NOT ABLE TO AGREE ON THE RECEIVER AND AMOUNT OF BOND, EACH PARTY SHOULD SUBMIT 2 NAMES OF CANDIDATES (INCLUDE DECLARATIONS FROM THE CANDIDATES AND CVS) NO LATER THAN JUNE 13, 2014. IF PARTIES ARE NOT ABLE TO AGREE ON THE AMOUNT OF BOND, IT WILL BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura/KTom; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Cross Complaint;
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Amended Notice Of Motion To Appoint Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Perdue, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-291-0474), for Wei Ang Yu, Plaintiff and moving party.
Kari S. Bower, Esq. of Steven Adair MacDonald & Associates, P.C., for Xi You Tan, Defendant and opposing party.

Plaintiff's counsel reports in open court that no agreement was achieved during the meet and confer prior to the hearing re receiver and amount of bond. Court hears arguments from both sides.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS WEI YU and MU TAN's Motion To Appoint Receiver is GRANTED. Parties are ordered to meet and confer re: (1) receiver; and (2) amount of bond. If parties are not able to agree on the receiver and amount of bond, each party should submit 2 names of candidates (include declarations from the candidates and CVs) no later than June 13, 2014. If parties are not able to agree on the amount of bond, it will be determined by the Court. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Mtn To Appoint Receiver
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Off Calendar
